title: STOP Using Claude to Code. Do THIS Instead.
summary: Austin Marchese argues that Claude Code is not just for coding but should form the foundation of a personal AI operating system that learns user patterns, retains memory, and improves with use. He frames this as "owning" AI rather than "renting" it and positions this approach as critical for building sustainable AI-driven workflows and scaling to teams.
